body_txt: A ban on using magic. Usually in effect just for certain places or circumstances, but occasionally is complete. An Anti-Magical Faction , naturally, will almost always enforce such a ban when they have the power to. The ban is often prompted by a notion of magic being evil . There is more than one sort of magic ban. For purposes of definition, we will divide them into these classes: Type A: Partial bans. As previously said, this is more common. Subtypes of this: Type B: Complete ban on magic. Especially fun if the heroes are magic users. Note that many situations that look like a total ban are really a partial ban — there will usually be a small group of mages tasked with enforcing the ban unless there's a non-magical way to do so, like a natural or "technological" Power Nullifier . See also Muggle Power .
